PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 21, 2013 is admitted to probate. Linda Frances Bisson is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
